name: golang-github-cloudflare-go-metrics-dev
title: golang-github-cloudflare-go-metrics-dev
summary: Cloudflare's fork of Go port of Coda Hale's Metrics library
description:
Cloudflare's fork of Go port of Coda Hale's Metrics library
This package is a fork of Richard Crowley's Go port of Coda Hale's
Metrics library for Java. It allows one to easily collect metrics from an
application written in Go in an unobtrusive way. Metrics can then be
exported to syslog, files or to a storage system like Graphite.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cloudflare-go-metrics-dev because Cloudflare's fork of Go port of Coda Hale's Metrics library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cloudflare-go-metrics-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cloudflare-go-metrics-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cloudflare-go-metrics-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
